DEPT 1/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:MARILYN NORMAN/CLERK:G. SHULL. C/C FOR SETTLMENT CONFERENCE. ATNY ARLENE HELFRICH PRESENT WITH PLTF. DEFT KELLY LOGAN PRESENT IN PRO-PER. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE STIPULATED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOGAN, KELLY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 155 RALSTON STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $4,142.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,142.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-23-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & ATNYS FEES. IF DFT PAYS $3400.00 IN LUMP SUM ON/BEFORE 9-23-95, PMT WILL CONSTITUTE FULL SATISF OF JUDGMNT OR IF DFT MAKES INSTALL PMTS STARTING 10- 15-95, PLTF WILL VACATE MONEY JUDGMNT EX-PARTE. IF ANY DEFLT FULL AMOUNT DUE. SEE STIP FOR FURTHER CONDITIONS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARKHAM, CYNTHIA AS TO DEFENDANT LOGAN, KELLY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
